landing.heroSubtitle: Your complete, free, and ad-free pregnancy companion.
landing.heroDescription: From day one to birth: baby tracking, 10+ health trackers, duo mode, 250+ names, and PDF birth plan.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for your pregnancy
landing.featuresSubtitle: 10+ free tools to support you from day one to birth.
landing.feature_weeklyTrackingDesc: Size, weight, fruit comparison, and personalized tips every week
landing.feature_healthTrackersDesc: Weight, water, symptoms, mood, blood pressure, sleep, contractions, and more
landing.feature_contractionsDesc: Precise timer with history, duration, and real-time frequency
landing.feature_duoDesc: Share the journey with your partner who follows everything in real time
landing.feature_bumpDiaryDesc: Capture every moment and compare your belly's evolution
landing.feature_agendaDesc: All your appointments organized in one place with reminders
landing.feature_namesDesc: Explore, filter by origin, and save your favorite names
landing.feature_guidesDesc: Nutrition, exercise, FAQ, and professionally validated advice
landing.feature_birthPlanDesc: Create and export your personalized birth plan as PDF
landing.feature_sleepMoodDesc: Log your sleep quality and mood day by day
landing.whySubtitle: What sets us apart from other apps.
landing.why_freeDesc: No hidden premium version, no subscription, no ads. Everything is accessible from signup.
landing.why_pwaDesc: MamaTrack is a PWA: open it in your browser and add it to your home screen. That's it!
landing.why_ivfDesc: The only app that accounts for assisted reproductive technology journeys.
landing.why_offlineDesc: Your data syncs automatically as soon as you're back online.
landing.weekPreviewSubtitle: Discover your baby's development with relatable comparisons.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about MamaTrack.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of expectant mothers tracking their pregnancy with MamaTrack.
